<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Monstera Deliciosa](22-monstera-deliciosa.jpg)

The houseplant that single-handedly shaped a decade of interior design. Big leaves, holes that get more dramatic as it grows, happy in a corner away from direct sun.

## What's in it

- Monstera deliciosa, mature plant
- Two-size moss pole included with the large
- Care card

## Care

Bright indirect light, water when the top 5 cm of soil is dry. Wipe the leaves monthly — they don't enjoy dust.
